specSection:
REQUIRED_COLUMNS := ["Proposal", "Plan", "Backlog", "Ready", "In Progress", "Done", "Needs Human"]
verifyColumns :: [String] → [String]
verifyColumns(required) = required ∖ existingColumns()
ground_truth_rationale: Default backlog columns are 'To Do', 'In Progress', 'Done'. Required columns minus existing = ['Proposal', 'Plan', 'Backlog', 'Ready', 'Needs Human']. Five columns are missing.
